rows.note: Real renders nav as centered 374-px floating absolute block over white body; sandbox renders header as full-bleed 1512 sticky bar
Real renders nested 'APEX-Agents/APEX-SWE' menu inline (text leaks into probe textContent); sandbox uses a single 'APEX ▾' label

props.real: NOT-IN-NAV (text-pill light gray rendered outside nav, top-right 1500-ish)
props.sandbox: indigo solid pill at x=1312 y=13, color white, bg rgb(79,70,229), radius 8px

topMismatches: Brand: real shows only purple 'M' monogram; sandbox shows 'M mercor' wordmark — major brand identity diff
Log in: real uses ghost/text-pill (gray bg ≈#f3f4f6 with dark text); sandbox uses primary indigo pill (white text on rgb(79,70,229))
Nav width: real centered 374px absolute, sandbox 1512 sticky full-bleed with white bg
Font weight on nav links: real 400, sandbox 500
MAJOR: real stats are wrapped in a single rounded pill (border-radius:9999px, w=599); sandbox has no container pill at all — radius=0, display=block

Typography: real labels 12.75px gray rgb(75,85,99) weight 500; sandbox 15px black weight 400 with values rendered MUCH larger ($143/hr inflated to ~36px) — sandbox over-emphasizes values vs real subtle pill
Numbers also differ: real $144/hr / 260.1k / $3.0M+; sandbox $143/hr / 259.8k / $2.9M+ — fixture data drift (acceptable but flag)

MAJOR: fontWeight 400 (real) vs 700 (sandbox) — real uses custom 'Macan' font where 400 looks heavy; sandbox uses system fallback with explicit bold — visually similar weight, but typography fidelity differs
h1 width 1400 (real, full-bleed text container) vs 720 (sandbox, constrained); real centers via text-align:center; sandbox centers via container width — y-offset off by 23px
Real x=56 (container starts at body padding), sandbox x=396 (container is centered max-w-720)
Subtitle wraps in real (400px wide → 2 lines, 48px tall); sandbox renders on 1 line (720px wide, 27px tall)
fontSize 16 (real) vs 18 (sandbox)
color: real darker (#1f2937) sandbox lighter (#4b5563)
Start working width 142 vs 118 — sandbox button is more compact (24px narrower)
Learn more bg: real gray (#f3f4f6) sandbox white (#fff) — different secondary button style
Border radius: real 6px sandbox 8px
fontSize 18 vs 22 — sandbox headers heavier/larger
fontWeight 400 vs 600
Right-edge affordance: real carousel chevrons (< / >); sandbox 'See all →' link → different navigation model

props.real: width ~360 (4 visible at 1400 viewport), avatar = stacked 3-letter colored gradient circles (LFA, MGB), 'N hired recently' subtle gray, NO category tag, Apply as plain text link on right
props.sandbox: width 400, avatar = single rounded square 3-letter chip 'IME' gray bg, MEDICAL pill tag bottom, Apply as solid indigo pill button

topMismatches: Card width 360 (real) vs 400 (sandbox) — sandbox uses 3-col grid vs real 4-col carousel
Avatar: real uses 3 overlapping circles with gradient backgrounds + initials (suggests 'hired people' faces); sandbox uses single rounded-square initial chip — different semantics
Category tag: real has none; sandbox shows uppercase MEDICAL gray pill — extra element in sandbox
Apply: real plain underline text link right-aligned; sandbox primary solid indigo Apply pill with white text — wrong visual weight
